subject: fix(theme): remove meta theme-color suggested implementation
body:
The Meta Theme-Color section suggested dynamically switching theme-color
between background colors on dark mode toggle. This caused invisible
status bar text when the OS color scheme opposed the app theme. Removed
the entire section, the dynamic update from the useDarkMode hook, and
the related Key Lessons. Projects should handle theme-color on their own
terms, not follow a flawed pattern.

Tags: pwa, theme, dark-mode, documentation, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
